result.stdout:
Usage: chell [--ref <String>...] [--using <String>...] [--silent] [--eval <String>] [--completion] [--help] [--version] filename-or-args0 ... filename-or-argsN

Chell.Run: Run C# script instantly.

Arguments:
  0: filename-or-args    The path to a script file, or arguments to pass to the script

Options:
  -r, --ref <String>...      Additional reference assembly
  -u, --using <String>...    Additional `using` namespace
  -q, --silent               
  -e, --eval <String>        A one-line program that can be run instantly.
  --completion               Generate a shell completion code
  -h, --help                 Show help message
  --version                  Show version
